hero.subtitle: I'm Kauã Aissa, a Full Stack & Automation Developer. I build scalable web applications and automations (Python/RPA) that cut costs and eliminate manual work - from concept to deploy.

about.title: Hi, I'm Kauã Aissa.
paragraphs: Full Stack & Automation Developer with 2 years of experience in large corporate environments. Currently at the Pague Menos supermarket chain, I work across the full software lifecycle - from concept and requirements gathering to deployment and support.

I operate on two main fronts: modern, scalable web systems focused on user experience; and operational efficiency, with scripts (Python/Selenium) and process automations (RPA) that deliver drastic cost reduction and performance gains.

Analytical and systemic profile, focused on the agile mitigation of incidents under pressure and the continuous improvement of legacy systems. I also provide Service Desk support. Graduate of the P-TECH/AMS program (IBM and Centro Paula Souza partnership) and currently deepening my studies in intelligent agents and AI.

metrics.title: Results that speak for themselves.

projects.title: Featured projects.
projects.subtitle: A selection of systems and automations focused on real impact.

items.name: NeoCognix Lab
items.description: Interactive portal simulating the control panel of an advanced research laboratory. Interface inspired by sci-fi HUDs, combining glassmorphism, neon glow, animated particles and fluid transitions, presenting four fictional technologies with simulation modules.

items.name: SEFAZ NF-e
items.description: Integration with SEFAZ web services for distribution (NFeDistribuicaoDFe) and protocol query (NFeConsultaProtocolo4) of electronic invoices, with authentication via A1 digital certificate in PEM format. A real project delivered as freelance work.

items.name: Culinary AI Chat
items.description: AI web chat built with Node.js + Express integrated with the OpenAI API. Configured as a Culinary Mentor: suggests recipes, ingredient substitutions, cooking tips and flavor pairing, with a warm, rustic home-kitchen look.

items.name: WhatsApp AI Chatbot
items.description: Intelligent WhatsApp chatbot built with Python + Flask, integrated with the OpenAI API and the WhatsApp Cloud API (Meta), replying to messages automatically and contextually.

items.name: Windows Non-Admin Launcher
items.description: Security-focused .bat script that uses the Windows RunAsInvoker variable to run programs in compatibility mode, ignoring manifests that require administrator privileges without inheriting the parent process permissions.

items.name: +20 Systems & Automations
items.description: Working in a corporate environment, I have delivered more than 20 systems and automations focused on quality and results. Due to confidentiality, the specific projects cannot be disclosed publicly.
